channel.title: Data Import on Econumo
channel.description: Recent content in Data Import on Econumo

item.title: A Simple Guide to Import a CSV File Into Econumo
item.description: Getting your transaction data into Econumo is where the magic begins. You start by grabbing a CSV file of your transaction history directly from your bank. Once you have that file, you’ll do a quick cleanup to make sure columns like Date, Description, and Amount are properly formatted. Then, just upload it into the app and match your columns to Econumo’s fields. It’s a straightforward, manual process that puts you in the driver’s seat, giving you complete control and privacy over your financial data.
